'''Tiree Captison''' was the [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] of [[Yeorg Captison]]. The sister-in-law of [[Dol Captison]] and the aunt/[[Parent/Legends|adoptive mother]] of [[Gaeriel Captison]], Tiree married Yeorg Captison [[Time/Legends|sometime]] before the latter became a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].

Sometime before [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]], Tiree and Yeorg's orphaned grand-niece [[Malinza Thanas]] was adopted by another family.
